texto: I don't have time is the worst possible excuse for I'd rather be doing something else. You MAKE time! Whether it be family, friends or an activity, like reading it's all in what you WANT to do. The heartbreaking moment is when you have extended time & devotion sometimes years with someone you knew to be worthy who can return it & they CHOOSE not to.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Gypsie M. Holley: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I don't have time is the worst possible excuse for I'd rather be doing something else. You MAKE t…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amor, excuses, family pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de termino e family.
